description: Diagnostic snapshot of chronyd source comparison (one row per chrony source per snapshot, ~1/min from the fusion service). Per-source fields come from `chronyc sources` + `chronyc sourcestats`; the trailing `*_offset_s` and `reference_id` columns are denormalised from `chronyc tracking` and repeated across every row of the snapshot so per-source queries can read tracking context without a join.

quality_flags.GOOD: Not used — this is a diagnostic product. chrony's own selection state (source_state column) is the quality signal.

fields.name: unix_time
fields.description: Snapshot wall-clock UTC as seconds since the Unix epoch (joinable with other products' minute_boundary_utc)

fields.name: source_mode
fields.description: chrony source mode character: '#' refclock, '^' server, '=' peer

fields.name: source_state
fields.description: chrony selection state character: '*' selected, '+' combined, '-' not combined, 'x' falseticker, '~' too variable, '?' unusable

fields.name: reach
fields.description: Reachability register (chronyc displays octal; stored here as the integer value)

fields.name: offset_us
fields.description: Adjusted offset measured from this source

fields.name: n_samples
fields.description: Number of sourcestats samples retained in chrony's window

fields.name: frequency_ppm
fields.description: Estimated frequency offset of this source vs the local clock

fields.name: freq_skew_ppm
fields.description: Estimated standard deviation of the source frequency

fields.name: sys_offset_s
fields.description: From `chronyc tracking`: system clock offset right after the last update. Broadcast to every row of this snapshot; NULL if tracking parse failed.

fields.name: rms_offset_s
fields.description: From `chronyc tracking`: long-term RMS of offsets. Broadcast to every row of this snapshot; NULL if tracking parse failed.

fields.name: reference_id
fields.description: From `chronyc tracking`: synced-from reference ID. Broadcast to every row of this snapshot; NULL if tracking parse failed.
